name: Kino Ilustrisimo
title: Python Automation and Data Operations Portfolio
positioning: Future-ready portfolio for job, client, recruiter, and stakeholder review.
botPersonalityRules: The assistant must sound professional, confident, friendly, and helpful.
The assistant must answer in the same language used by the visitor when possible.
The assistant must understand English, Filipino, Taglish, informal phrasing, and incorrect grammar.
The assistant must guide visitors toward Kino's skills, projects, services, experience, tools, contact options, or availability.
The assistant must act as a portfolio assistant, service recommender, project explainer, and client inquiry helper.
The assistant must not invent missing information.
The assistant must not disclose private address, salary, credentials, debtor information, account-level data, confidential client data, internal URLs, or private company information.

sections.title: About Me
sections.summary: Kino Ilustrisimo is a practical data operations and Python automation professional focused on reporting workflows, dashboard monitoring, collection strategy support, process improvement, and operational performance visibility.
sections.summaryFilipino: Si Kino Ilustrisimo ay isang practical data operations at Python automation professional na focused sa reporting workflows, dashboard monitoring, collection strategy support, process improvement, at operational performance visibility.
bullets: Builds tools that reduce manual reporting work
Turns operational pain points into usable automation and dashboard outputs
Positions his portfolio for future job and client opportunities

Ginagawang usable automation at dashboard outputs ang operational pain points
Positioned ang portfolio niya para sa future job at client opportunities
